global.description: The ad features a vibrant blue background with bold text elements promoting a travel service.
global.main_message: Promoting last-minute travel savings with a clear call to action.

elements.label: Solid blue background
elements.description: A solid blue background fills the entire canvas, providing a vibrant and engaging backdrop.

elements.label: NomadLaye UGC
elements.description: Large, bold text at the top center, featuring the brand name 'NomadLaye' in a prominent font.

elements.label: Last-minute savings
elements.description: Medium-sized text below the headline, stating 'Last-minute savings' in a clear, readable font.

elements.label: Hotels + flights in one tap
elements.description: Smaller text beneath the main body text, providing additional information about the service offered.
A small price tag in the bottom left corner, displaying '$4.99' in a bold font.

elements.label: Install now
elements.description: A prominent call-to-action button at the bottom center, urging users to 'Install now' in a contrasting color.

elements.label: Circular icons
elements.description: Two small circular icons positioned near the bottom, adding a decorative touch to the layout.

elements.label: Geometric shapes
elements.description: A mix of geometric shapes in the background, contributing to the overall design without specific meaning.

elements.label: Top banner
elements.description: A banner at the top of the ad, containing the brand name and additional text, creating a focal point.

elements.label: Service description
elements.description: Text at the bottom of the ad that describes the service, emphasizing convenience and savings.
elements.text_content: Last-minute savings Hotels flights in one tap

elements.label: Install now button
elements.description: A clear and inviting button at the bottom, encouraging immediate action with the text 'Install now'.
